challenges.title: Setting List Style Types
challenges.description: Write CSS that sets `list-style-type` for both unordered and ordered lists. Set `ul` to use `square` markers and `ol` to use `lower-roman` numbering. Assign your CSS to the variable `css`.
challenges.test_code:
assert 'list-style-type' in css.lower(), 'Should use list-style-type property'
assert 'square' in css.lower(), 'Should set ul to square markers'
assert 'lower-roman' in css.lower(), 'Should set ol to lower-roman numbering'
assert 'ul' in css.lower(), 'Should target ul elements'
assert 'ol' in css.lower(), 'Should target ol elements'
hints: list-style-type controls the marker appearance for list items
Common values include disc, circle, square, decimal, lower-roman, upper-alpha

challenges.title: List Style Shorthand with Image
challenges.description: Write CSS that uses the `list-style` shorthand property. Create a rule for `.custom-list` that sets `list-style` to combine a type of `disc`, position of `inside`, and an image using `url('bullet.png')`. Also create a rule for `.no-bullets` that sets `list-style-type: none`. Assign your CSS to the variable `css`.
challenges.test_code:
assert 'list-style' in css.lower(), 'Should use list-style property'
assert 'inside' in css.lower(), 'Should set list-style-position to inside'
assert 'url(' in css.lower(), 'Should use url() for a custom bullet image'
assert 'none' in css.lower(), 'Should set list-style-type to none for .no-bullets'
assert '.custom-list' in css.lower(), 'Should target .custom-list'
assert '.no-bullets' in css.lower(), 'Should target .no-bullets'
hints: The list-style shorthand combines type, position, and image in one declaration
list-style-position: inside places the marker inside the content flow
